channel.title: Menu on GOODJINC
channel.description: Recent content in Menu on GOODJINC

item.title: Building a Hugo Blog (3): Language Settings and Menu Customization
item.author: hello@goodjinc.com (GOODJINC)
item.description:
title: “Building a Hugo Blog (3): Language Settings and Menu Customization” slug: hugo-customization date: 2026-01-08T08:40:00+09:00 description: “Understand the configuration file structure of the Blowfish theme, change the blog language to Korean, and learn how to configure profiles and menus.” series: [“Building a Hugo Blog”] series_order: 3 categories: [“Hugo”, “Customization”] tags: [“TOML”, “Configuration”, “Menu”, “Profile”, “i18n”] draft: false
#

In the previous part, we successfully applied the Blowfish theme and launched the local server. However, what you see on the screen is still just the basic default setup.
